calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ISEF-001 harm gradient baseline -- warm-start gate diagnostic
items.notes: DEV-NEED-029 warm-start gate. 2-arm diagnostic: ARM_0 proximity_harm_scale=0.05 (cold-start control) vs ARM_1 proximity_harm_scale=0.30 (treatment). PASS gates all downstream ARC-065, Q-043/044/045, INV-049 retests.

items.title: GAP-3 transient benefit patches env feature substrate validation
items.notes: infant_substrate:GAP-3 substrate-readiness diagnostic (analogous to V3-EXQ-576 for GAP-1). 2-arm: ARM_0 transient_benefit_enabled=False (counters exactly zero) vs ARM_1 enabled (prob=0.15, duration=15, multiplier=2.0). PASS = C1 spawn-rate in band AND C2 ARM_0 fully silent AND C3 patches expire AND C4 contact pays resource_benefit*multiplier exactly. Unblocks DEV-NEED-006 (z_goal seeding via accidental benefit contacts) + MECH-189. experiment_purpose=diagnostic; claim_ids=[] (no governance weighting).
